errorPreview.title: Error page preview routes
errorPreview.description: Use this page to preview the major HTTP error states with their real UI. The 401, 403, 404, and 500 previews intentionally trigger the matching Next.js control flow. The 429 and 503 previews open their dedicated pages directly.
errorPreview.note: This route is intentionally not linked from the main navigation. Open it directly whenever you need to verify the error UI.

rateLimit.title: Too Many Requests
rateLimit.description: Open the rate limit page directly.

serverError.title: Runtime Error
serverError.description: Throw an intentional route error and render the generic error UI.

serviceUnavailable.title: Service Unavailable
serviceUnavailable.description: Open the temporary outage page directly.

meta.description: Community website for VRC 10月同期会

hero.title: VRC 10月同期会
hero.subtitle: A community for VRC 10月同期会 members

detail.noBio: This member hasn't written a bio yet.

detail.noDescription: This club does not have a description yet

fields.name: Display Name
fields.isPublicHelp: When off, your profile won't appear in the members list

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in with your Discord account
login.footnote: This site is for VRC 10月同期会 Discord members only

errors.csrf_failed: Session invalid. Please reload the page.
errors.not_guild_member: This site is only available to VRC 10月同期会 Discord server members.
errors.discord_error: An error occurred during Discord authentication.
errors.suspended: This account has been suspended. Please contact an administrator.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.heroTitle: Review the main operational metrics in one place.
dashboard.heroDescription: This page summarizes the main counts and links to the admin areas you use most. If there are pending reports, review them first.
dashboard.pulsePrimaryAlert: There are {count} pending reports. Review their status before moving on to other work.
dashboard.pulsePrimaryCalm: There are no pending reports. You can continue with other maintenance tasks.
dashboard.pulseSecondaryText: There are {count} events. Open event management to review dates and publication status.
dashboard.pulseTertiaryText: There are {count} clubs. Update club details and photos from club management and galleries.
dashboard.actionsDescription: Open the admin screens you use most often.

actions.membersDescription: Review roles, account status, and profile access.
actions.eventsDescription: Update schedules, descriptions, and publication status.
actions.scheduleDescription: Open the internal schedule board to adjust staff entries, restricted slots, and notification rules.
actions.rolesDescription: Tune built-in role permissions and Discord-linked dashboard roles.

dashboard.moodboardFirstText: There are {count} registered members. Keep that scale in mind before changing public-facing pages.
dashboard.moodboardSecondText: Verify gallery scope before updating content.
dashboard.moodboardThirdText: There are {count} pending reports. Treat them as the highest priority when the count is not zero.

page.title: Role policies
page.description: Manage fixed role permissions and dashboard roles linked to Discord role IDs.

roleDescriptions.member: Baseline user role. You can selectively grant dashboard access from here.
roleDescriptions.staff: Default operations role. Best for review-focused permissions.
roleDescriptions.admin: Higher operations role. You can tune every admin capability except super-admin.

system.title: Built-in role permissions
system.description: Edit the default permissions for member, staff, and admin. super-admin always keeps every permission.

managed.title: Managed dashboard roles
managed.description: Map Discord role IDs to dashboard permissions. super-admin stays outside this table.
managed.empty: No managed roles yet. Add the Discord roles that should unlock dashboard access.

placeholders.description: Describe who should receive this role and why.

can_view_dashboard.label: View dashboard
can_view_dashboard.hint: Allow access to the admin overview and stats.

can_manage_users.label: Manage users
can_manage_users.hint: Change user status and inspect member records.

can_manage_roles.label: Manage roles
can_manage_roles.hint: Edit role policies and change app roles except super-admin.

can_manage_events.label: Manage events
can_manage_events.hint: Use event creation, update, and publishing tools.

can_manage_reports.label: Manage reports
can_manage_reports.hint: Review moderation reports and change their status.

can_manage_clubs.label: Manage clubs
can_manage_clubs.hint: Create clubs and update club records.

dialog.changeRoleDesc: Select a new role for this user.
dialog.suspendDesc: Are you sure? This user will lose access.
dialog.activateDesc: This will restore the user's access.

dialog.deleteDesc: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

galleries.title: Gallery Management
galleries.description: Manage whether each photo belongs to the whole community or to a specific club.
galleries.uploadHelp: Choose whether the photos belong to the whole community or to a specific club, then upload them from your device.
galleries.uploadConstraints: Upload up to {maxFiles} files per batch, {maxSizeMB}MB each, and {totalSizeMB}MB total.

dialog.deleteDesc: Are you sure? This will permanently delete the image.

errors.noFiles: Select at least one image to upload
errors.totalTooLarge: The total upload size is too large. Keep it under {maxSizeMB}MB

dropzone.title: Drag and drop images here, or click to browse
dropzone.description: PNG, JPG, and WebP up to {maxSizeMB}MB

errors.tooMany: You can select up to {maxFiles} files at once
errors.unsupported: {fileName} is not supported. Use PNG, JPG, or WebP
errors.tooLarge: {fileName} is too large. Keep it under {maxSizeMB}MB

aria.uploadArea: Upload images. Drag and drop or click to browse.

dialog.deleteDesc: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

meta.title: Schedule
meta.description: Internal schedule board for staff operations

hero.description: Manage public and restricted entries in one board, with templates and notification rules alongside the timeline.

timeline.title: Click or drag to create a time slot
timeline.description: Click an empty lane to create a 30-minute slot, or drag to select a longer range before opening the editor.

editor.rangeHint: The selected range from the timeline is prefilled here so you can fine tune the details.
editor.title: Title
editor.descriptionPlaceholder: Add any detail that should appear in the entry and notifications.

visibility.help: Restricted entries are fully visible only to the selected Discord roles.

editor.restrictedRoles: Discord roles allowed to view the full entry
editor.autoNotifyDescription: Only enabled entries are eligible for scheduled Discord webhook notices.
editor.confirmTemplate: Replace the current title and description with the selected template?

errors.restrictedRoles: Select at least one role that can view the restricted event.
errors.timeOrder: The end time must be later than the start time.

roles.title: Managed Discord roles
roles.description: Define which Discord roles can view restricted entries and manage events, templates, or notifications.

placeholders.description: Explain what this role can operate.

roles.empty: No managed roles yet. Add the Discord roles that should operate the schedule board.

errors.save: Failed to save the managed role.
errors.delete: Failed to delete the managed role.

templates.title: Reusable titles and descriptions
templates.description: Save common copy blocks so new entries are faster to create and more consistent.
templates.empty: No templates yet. Add reusable copy for common entry types.

notifications.title: Discord webhook delivery rules
notifications.description: Use one webhook endpoint and define multiple lead-time or daily summary rules.
notifications.webhookDescription: Use a single Discord webhook endpoint for automated schedule notifications.
notifications.beforeSummary: Send {minutes} minutes before the entry starts.
notifications.dailySummary: Send every day at {time} for entries between {start} and {end} minutes.
notifications.empty: No notification rules yet. Create one for lead time reminders or daily summaries.

errors.saveRule: Failed to save the notification rule.
errors.deleteRule: Failed to delete the notification rule.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

unauthorized.title: Please log in to continue
unauthorized.description: You need to be authenticated to view this page. Sign in and try again.

forbidden.title: You do not have access
forbidden.description: Your account does not have permission to view this page or perform this action.

rateLimit.title: Too many requests
rateLimit.description: Requests are coming in too quickly right now. Please wait a moment and try again.
rateLimit.descriptionWithRetryAfter: Requests are coming in too quickly right now. Please try again in about {seconds} seconds.

serviceUnavailable.title: Service temporarily unavailable
serviceUnavailable.description: The service is busy or undergoing maintenance. Please try again in a little while.
serviceUnavailable.descriptionWithRetryAfter: The service is busy or undergoing maintenance. Please try again in about {seconds} seconds.

errors.network: Unable to connect. Check your internet connection.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.conflict: This resource was modified by someone else. Please refresh.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.submissionFailedDescription: An error occurred while saving. Please check your input and try again.

report.title: Report Inappropriate Content
report.description: If you find an issue with this content, please describe the problem below.
report.submitted: Report submitted. Thank you for your help.
